title: Deeper Oceans
body:
# Deeper Oceans

**Deeper Oceans** is a project that makes oceans twice as deep as vanilla.

---

**Mod Exclusive**: Vanilla ocean monuments are lowered 20 blocks to prevent the legs of the monument looking too out-of-place. There's also a config file for changing the ocean's depth and the ocean monument offset.

Tectonic is not compatible as it already makes oceans deeper.
